name: Sherry Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the mustard powder with cold water in a medium-sized bowl until well combined.
2. Set aside for 10 minutes to allow the mixture to thicken slightly.
3. Stir in the dry sherry, brown rice syrup, and white wine vinegar until you have a spreadable consistency.
4. Serve immediately or cover and store in the refrigerator for up to six months.
5. This mustard makes a good addition to sauces.
